descriptionShort: Sports notes mentioning Richmond Sockeyes' captain Clarke fighting and BCJHL standings with Nanaimo Clippers.
descriptionLong: Column of sports notes from Nanaimo Daily News dated November 10, 1987. Mentions Richmond Sockeyes captain Clarke dropping gloves against Nanaimo Clippers' Jack Piechutta in a BCJHL game. Includes BCJHL standings showing Sockeyes leading with 11-8-1 record, Clippers in second with 10-6-1, and Whalers in third with 7-7-1.

attribution.headline: Notes, quotes and leftovers from the wonderful world of sports
